name: Diagnostic-only L0 hybrid retrieval simulator
summary: Builds read-only manifest diagnostics for simulated BM25+dense L0 candidate scoring at manifest.diagnostics.l0_retrieval_simulator, with selection_effect none and zero write/index/embedding side effects.
limits: Diagnostic-only; does not perform automatic L0 retrieval.
Does not change context selection or provider prompts.
Does not call external embedding APIs or create production embeddings.
Does not mutate vector indexes, document indexes, or repository memory stores.
Dense scores must be externally supplied by fixtures or read-only snapshots.
Reranker is omitted or literal none only; non-none reranking requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
No token budget enforcement or token budget telemetry.
risks: Diagnostic retrieval_score may be misread as selection authority unless selection_effect none and guardrails remain explicit.
Future live retrieval, production embeddings, reranking, or adapter integration must not be inferred from this diagnostic slice.
recommended_next_actions: Create a completion warrant for PLAN-20260706-0002 after self-model registration is committed.
Keep any future adapter, reranker, telemetry, or live retrieval work behind a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
